<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Sukin Jeyavel — Data Analyst &amp; AI Automation</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700;800&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root{
    --bg:#15171C;
    --surface:#1B1E25;
    --panel:#21242C;
    --panel-border:#343844;
    --signal:#E8A33D;
    --signal-dim:#b9802b;
    --text:#F5F3EE;
    --text-muted:#A6A9B2;
    --text-faint:#6C6F79;
    --c1:#E8A33D;
    --c2:#E2654E;
    --c3:#3FA796;
    --c4:#8C7AE6;
    --mono:'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
    --sans:'Inter', sans-serif;
  }
  *{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;}
  html{scroll-behavior:smooth;}
  body{
    background:var(--bg);
    color:var(--text);
    font-family:var(--sans);
    line-height:1.6;
    overflow-x:hidden;
  }
  a{color:inherit;text-decoration:none;}

  /* Focus visibility */
  a:focus-visible, button:focus-visible{
    outline:2px solid var(--signal);
    outline-offset:3px;
  }

  @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce){
    *{animation-duration:0.01ms !important; transition-duration:0.01ms !important;}
  }

  /* ===== Layout shell ===== */
  .shell{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:280px 1fr;
    min-height:100vh;
  }

  /* ===== Sidebar ===== */
  .sidebar{
    position:fixed;
    top:0; left:0;
    width:280px;
    height:100vh;
    background:var(--surface);
    border-right:1px solid var(--panel-border);
    display:flex;
    flex-direction:column;
    padding:36px 32px;
    z-index:50;
  }
  .sb-id{
    margin-bottom:32px;
  }
  .sb-photo{
    width:72px;height:72px;
    border-radius:50%;
    overflow:hidden;
    border:2px solid var(--signal);
    margin-bottom:18px;
  }
  .sb-photo img{
    width:100%;height:100%;
    object-fit:cover;
    display:block;
  }
  .sb-id .tag{
    font-family:var(--mono);
    font-size:11px;
    color:var(--signal);
    letter-spacing:0.12em;
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap:8px;
    margin-bottom:14px;
  }
  .sb-id .tag::before{
    content:'';
    width:7px;height:7px;
    border-radius:50%;
    background:var(--signal);
    box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(232,163,61,0.6);
    animation:pulse 2.4s infinite;
  }
  @keyframes pulse{
    0%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(232,163,61,0.45);}
    70%{box-shadow:0 0 0 6px rgba(232,163,61,0);}
    100%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(232,163,61,0);}
  }
  .sb-id h1{
    font-family:var(--mono);
    font-size:22px;
    font-weight:700;
    line-height:1.3;
    letter-spacing:-0.01em;
  }
  .sb-id .role{
    margin-top:8px;
    font-size:13px;
    color:var(--text-muted);
    line-height:1.5;
  }

  .sb-nav{
    display:flex;
    flex-direction:column;
    gap:2px;
    flex:1;
  }
  .sb-nav a{
    font-family:var(--mono);
    font-size:13px;
    color:var(--text-faint);
    padding:10px 12px;
    border-radius:6px;
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap:10px;
    transition:color 0.2s, background 0.2s;
  }
  .sb-nav a .n{
    color:var(--text-faint);
    font-size:11px;
  }
  .sb-nav a:hover, .sb-nav a.active{
    color:var(--text);
    background:var(--panel);
  }
  .sb-nav a.active .n, .sb-nav a:hover .n{
    color:var(--signal);
  }

  .sb-foot{
    display:flex;
    flex-direction:column;
    gap:10px;
    padding-top:24px;
    border-top:1px solid var(--panel-border);
  }
  .sb-foot a{
    font-size:12.5px;
    color:var(--text-muted);
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap:8px;
  }
  .sb-foot a:hover{color:var(--signal);}
  .sb-foot svg{width:14px;height:14px;flex-shrink:0;}

  /* ===== Mobile nav toggle ===== */
  .mobile-bar{
    display:none;
    position:fixed;
    top:0; left:0; right:0;
    height:64px;
    background:var(--surface);
    border-bottom:1px solid var(--panel-border);
    align-items:center;
    justify-content:space-between;
    padding:0 20px;
    z-index:100;
  }
  .mobile-bar .brand{
    font-family:var(--mono);
    font-weight:700;
    font-size:15px;
  }
  .mobile-bar button{
    background:none;
    border:1px solid var(--panel-border);
    color:var(--text);
    border-radius:6px;
    width:38px;height:38px;
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
    cursor:pointer;
  }

  /* ===== Main content ===== */
  .main{
    grid-column:2;
    padding:0 64px;
    max-width:1100px;
  }
  section{
    padding:96px 0;
    border-bottom:1px solid var(--panel-border);
  }
  section:last-of-type{border-bottom:none;}

  .eyebrow{
    font-family:var(--mono);
    font-size:12px;
    color:var(--signal);
    letter-spacing:0.14em;
    text-transform:uppercase;
    margin-bottom:18px;
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap:10px;
  }
  .eyebrow::after{
    content:'';
    flex:1;
    height:1px;
    background:var(--panel-border);
  }

  h2.section-title{
    font-family:var(--mono);
    font-size:32px;
    font-weight:700;
    margin-bottom:40px;
    letter-spacing:-0.01em;
  }

  /* ===== Hero ===== */
  .hero{
    padding-top:120px;
    padding-bottom:90px;
  }
  .hero-grid{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:1.1fr 0.9fr;
    gap:56px;
    align-items:center;
  }
  .hero-kicker{
    font-family:var(--mono);
    font-size:13px;
    color:var(--signal);
    margin-bottom:20px;
    letter-spacing:0.08em;
  }
  .hero h1{
    font-size:48px;
    font-weight:800;
    line-height:1.12;
    letter-spacing:-0.02em;
    margin-bottom:22px;
  }
  .hero h1 .hl{
    color:var(--signal);
  }
  .hero p.lede{
    font-size:16px;
    color:var(--text-muted);
    max-width:520px;
    margin-bottom:34px;
  }
  .hero-cta{
    display:flex;
    gap:14px;
    flex-wrap:wrap;
  }
  .btn{
    font-family:var(--mono);
    font-size:13px;
    font-weight:600;
    padding:13px 22px;
    border-radius:6px;
    display:inline-flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap:8px;
    transition:transform 0.15s, background 0.2s, border-color 0.2s;
  }
  .btn-primary{
    background:var(--signal);
    color:#1A1102;
  }
  .btn-primary:hover{
    transform:translateY(-2px);
    background:#f0b658;
  }
  .btn-secondary{
    border:1px solid var(--panel-border);
    color:var(--text);
  }
  .btn-secondary:hover{
    border-color:var(--signal);
    color:var(--signal);
    transform:translateY(-2px);
  }

  /* Hero diagram */
  .flow-card{
    background:var(--panel);
    border:1px solid var(--panel-border);
    border-radius:14px;
    padding:28px;
  }
  .flow-card .label{
    font-family:var(--mono);
    font-size:11px;
    color:var(--text-faint);
    letter-spacing:0.1em;
    margin-bottom:16px;
  }

  /* Hero portrait */
  .portrait-card{
    position:relative;
    border-radius:18px;
    overflow:hidden;
    border:1px solid var(--panel-border);
    background:var(--panel);
  }
  .portrait-card img{
    width:100%;
    display:block;
    aspect-ratio:4/4.4;
    object-fit:cover;
    object-position:center 30%;
    filter:saturate(1.04) contrast(1.03);
  }
  .portrait-overlay{
    position:absolute;
    left:0; right:0; bottom:0;
    padding:20px 22px;
    background:linear-gradient(180deg, transparent, rgba(21,23,28,0.92) 70%);
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    justify-content:space-between;
  }
  .portrait-overlay .who{
    font-family:var(--mono);
    font-size:12px;
    color:var(--text);
  }
  .portrait-overlay .who span{
    display:block;
    color:var(--text-faint);
    font-size:10.5px;
    margin-top:3px;
  }
  .portrait-badge{
    position:absolute;
    top:18px; right:18px;
    background:var(--signal);
    color:#1A1102;
    font-family:var(--mono);
    font-size:11px;
    font-weight:700;
    padding:6px 12px;
    border-radius:20px;
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap:6px;
  }
  .portrait-badge::before{
    content:'';
    width:6px;height:6px;
    border-radius:50%;
    background:#1A1102;
  }

  /* ===== Stat strip ===== */
  .stats{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);
    gap:1px;
    background:var(--panel-border);
    border:1px solid var(--panel-border);
    border-radius:10px;
    overflow:hidden;
    margin-top:64px;
  }
  .stat{
    background:var(--surface);
    padding:24px 20px;
  }
  .stat .num{
    font-family:var(--mono);
    font-size:26px;
    font-weight:700;
    color:var(--signal);
  }
  .stat .lbl{
    font-size:12px;
    color:var(--text-muted);
    margin-top:6px;
  }

  /* ===== About ===== */
  .about-grid{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:1.3fr 1fr;
    gap:56px;
  }
  .about-grid p{
    color:var(--text-muted);
    margin-bottom:16px;
    font-size:15px;
  }
  .skill-block{
    background:var(--panel);
    border:1px solid var(--panel-border);
    border-radius:10px;
    padding:20px;
    margin-bottom:14px;
  }
  .skill-block h4{
    font-family:var(--mono);
    font-size:11px;
    color:var(--signal);
    letter-spacing:0.08em;
    text-transform:uppercase;
    margin-bottom:10px;
  }
  .chip-row{
    display:flex;
    flex-wrap:wrap;
    gap:8px;
  }
  .chip{
    font-family:var(--mono);
    font-size:12px;
    background:var(--surface);
    border:1px solid var(--panel-border);
    color:var(--text-muted);
    padding:5px 10px;
    border-radius:5px;
  }

  /* ===== Experience ===== */
  .exp-card{
    background:var(--panel);
    border:1px solid var(--panel-border);
    border-radius:12px;
    padding:32px;
    position:relative;
  }
  .exp-head{
    display:flex;
    justify-content:space-between;
    align-items:flex-start;
    margin-bottom:6px;
    flex-wrap:wrap;
    gap:10px;
  }
  .exp-head h3{
    font-size:19px;
    font-weight:700;
  }
  .exp-status{
    font-family:var(--mono);
    font-size:11px;
    color:var(--signal);
    border:1px solid var(--signal-dim);
    background:rgba(232,163,61,0.08);
    padding:4px 10px;
    border-radius:20px;
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap:6px;
    white-space:nowrap;
  }
  .exp-status::before{
    content:'';
    width:6px;height:6px;
    border-radius:50%;
    background:var(--signal);
  }
  .exp-org{
    font-family:var(--mono);
    font-size:13px;
    color:var(--text-muted);
    margin-bottom:20px;
  }
  .exp-card ul{
    list-style:none;
    display:flex;
    flex-direction:column;
    gap:12px;
  }
  .exp-card li{
    padding-left:22px;
    position:relative;
    color:var(--text-muted);
    font-size:14.5px;
  }
  .exp-card li::before{
    content:'›';
    position:absolute;
    left:0;
    color:var(--signal);
    font-weight:700;
  }

  /* ===== Projects ===== */
  .proj-grid{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;
    gap:24px;
  }
  .proj-card{
    background:var(--panel);
    border:1px solid var(--panel-border);
    border-radius:14px;
    padding:30px;
    display:flex;
    flex-direction:column;
    position:relative;
    overflow:hidden;
    transition:border-color 0.25s, transform 0.25s, box-shadow 0.25s;
  }
  .proj-card::before{
    content:'';
    position:absolute;
    top:0; left:0; right:0;
    height:4px;
    background:var(--accent);
  }
  .proj-card:hover{
    transform:translateY(-5px);
    box-shadow:0 16px 32px -16px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
    border-color:var(--accent);
  }
  .proj-card.c1{--accent:var(--c1);}
  .proj-card.c2{--accent:var(--c2);}
  .proj-card.c3{--accent:var(--c3);}
  .proj-card.c4{--accent:var(--c4);}

  .proj-top{
    display:flex;
    justify-content:space-between;
    align-items:flex-start;
    margin-bottom:18px;
    margin-top:6px;
  }
  .proj-icon{
    width:44px;height:44px;
    border-radius:10px;
    background:color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 16%, transparent);
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    justify-content:center;
    flex-shrink:0;
  }
  .proj-icon svg{width:22px;height:22px;stroke:var(--accent);}
  .proj-tool{
    font-family:var(--mono);
    font-size:11px;
    color:var(--accent);
    background:color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 14%, transparent);
    border:1px solid var(--accent);
    padding:5px 10px;
    border-radius:5px;
    white-space:nowrap;
  }
  .proj-card h3{
    font-size:18px;
    font-weight:700;
    margin-bottom:14px;
    color:var(--text);
  }
  .proj-card ul{
    list-style:none;
    display:flex;
    flex-direction:column;
    gap:9px;
    color:var(--text-muted);
    font-size:13.5px;
  }
  .proj-card li{
    padding-left:18px;
    position:relative;
  }
  .proj-card li::before{
    content:'—';
    position:absolute;
    left:0;
    color:var(--accent);
  }

  /* ===== Certifications & Education ===== */
  .cred-grid{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;
    gap:24px;
  }
  .cred-col h4{
    font-family:var(--mono);
    font-size:12px;
    color:var(--text-faint);
    letter-spacing:0.1em;
    text-transform:uppercase;
    margin-bottom:20px;
  }
  .cred-item{
    border-left:2px solid var(--panel-border);
    padding:4px 0 22px 20px;
    margin-left:4px;
    position:relative;
  }
  .cred-item::before{
    content:'';
    position:absolute;
    left:-5px; top:4px;
    width:8px;height:8px;
    border-radius:50%;
    background:var(--signal);
  }
  .cred-item h5{
    font-size:15px;
    font-weight:600;
    margin-bottom:4px;
  }
  .cred-item .org{
    font-family:var(--mono);
    font-size:12px;
    color:var(--text-faint);
    margin-bottom:6px;
  }
  .cred-item p{
    font-size:13.5px;
    color:var(--text-muted);
  }

  /* ===== Contact / Footer ===== */
  .contact-wrap{
    text-align:left;
  }
  .contact-card{
    background:var(--panel);
    border:1px solid var(--panel-border);
    border-radius:14px;
    padding:48px;
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:1.2fr 1fr;
    gap:40px;
    align-items:center;
  }
  .contact-card h2{
    font-size:28px;
    font-weight:800;
    line-height:1.25;
    margin-bottom:14px;
  }
  .contact-card h2 .hl{color:var(--signal);}
  .contact-card p{
    color:var(--text-muted);
    font-size:14.5px;
  }
  .contact-links{
    display:flex;
    flex-direction:column;
    gap:12px;
  }
  .contact-links a{
    font-family:var(--mono);
    font-size:14px;
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap:12px;
    padding:14px 18px;
    border:1px solid var(--panel-border);
    border-radius:8px;
    color:var(--text);
    transition:border-color 0.2s, color 0.2s, background 0.2s;
  }
  .contact-links a:hover{
    border-color:var(--signal);
    color:var(--signal);
    background:rgba(232,163,61,0.05);
  }
  .contact-links svg{width:16px;height:16px;flex-shrink:0;}

  .site-foot{
    padding:36px 0 60px;
    text-align:center;
    font-family:var(--mono);
    font-size:12px;
    color:var(--text-faint);
  }

  /* ===== Responsive ===== */
  @media (max-width:980px){
    .shell{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
    .sidebar{display:none;}
    .sidebar.open{display:flex;}
    .mobile-bar{display:flex;}
    .main{grid-column:1; padding:0 24px; margin-top:64px;}
    .hero{padding-top:56px;}
    .hero-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr; gap:40px;}
    .hero h1{font-size:36px;}
    .stats{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);}
    .about-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
    .proj-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
    .cred-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
    .contact-card{grid-template-columns:1fr; padding:32px;}
    section{padding:64px 0;}
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="mobile-bar">
  <div class="brand">SUKIN.J</div>
  <button id="navToggle" aria-label="Toggle navigation">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M3 6h18M3 12h18M3 18h18"/></svg>
  </button>
</div>

<div class="shell">
  <aside class="sidebar" id="sidebar">
    <div class="sb-id">
      <div class="sb-photo"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Sukin Jeyavel"></div>
      <div class="tag">AVAILABLE FOR OPPORTUNITIES</div>
      <h1>Sukin<br>Jeyavel</h1>
      <div class="role">Data Analyst &amp; AI Automation Professional</div>
    </div>

    <nav class="sb-nav">
      <a href="#hero" class="nav-link active"><span class="n">00</span> Intro</a>
      <a href="#about" class="nav-link"><span class="n">01</span> About</a>
      <a href="#experience" class="nav-link"><span class="n">02</span> Experience</a>
      <a href="#projects" class="nav-link"><span class="n">03</span> Projects</a>
      <a href="#credentials" class="nav-link"><span class="n">04</span> Credentials</a>
      <a href="#contact" class="nav-link"><span class="n">05</span> Contact</a>
    </nav>

    <div class="sb-foot">
      <a href="mailto:sukin3563@gmail.com">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M4 4h16v16H4z"/><path d="M22 6l-10 7L2 6"/></svg>
        sukin3563@gmail.com
      </a>

        github.com/sukin2004
      </a>
      <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/sukin-j-a237662a3" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M19 3a2 2 0 012 2v14a2 2 0 01-2 2H5a2 2 0 01-2-2V5a2 2 0 012-2h14zM8.34 9.5H5.67V18.34h2.67V9.5zM7 8.31a1.54 1.54 0 100-3.08 1.54 1.54 0 000 3.08zM18.34 18.34h-2.67v-4.61c0-1.1-.02-2.51-1.53-2.51-1.53 0-1.77 1.2-1.77 2.44v4.68H9.7V9.5h2.56v1.2h.04c.36-.67 1.23-1.38 2.54-1.38 2.71 0 3.5 1.78 3.5 4.1v5.92z"/></svg>
        LinkedIn Profile

      <h2 class="section-title">Profile Summary</h2>
      <div class="about-grid">
        <div>
          <p>I'm an aspiring Data Analyst and AI Automation Professional with strong skills in Python, SQL, Power BI, and workflow automation using n8n. I'm passionate about turning raw, messy data into actionable insight — and then automating the path to that insight so it keeps generating value without manual rework.</p>
          <p>My hands-on experience spans real-world data cleaning, visualization, and dashboard creation using Pandas, NumPy, Seaborn, and Matplotlib, alongside AI-powered automation workflows including social media auto-posting systems, AI-based resume filtering, and end-to-end report automation.</p>
          <p>I combine this technical foundation with strong communication, analytical thinking, and a quick-learning mindset — currently completing my Bachelor of Engineering in Electronics and Communication at Nadar Saraswathi College of Engineering and Technology, Theni (Nov 2022 – May 2026).</p>
        </div>
        <div>

<script>
  // Mobile nav toggle
  const toggle = document.getElementById('navToggle');
  const sidebar = document.getElementById('sidebar');
  if(toggle){
    toggle.addEventListener('click', () => {
      sidebar.classList.toggle('open');
    });
  }

  // Active nav link on scroll
  const sections = document.querySelectorAll('section');
  const navLinks = document.querySelectorAll('.nav-link');

  const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach(entry => {
      if(entry.isIntersecting){
        const id = entry.target.getAttribute('id');
        navLinks.forEach(link => {
          link.classList.toggle('active', link.getAttribute('href') === '#' + id);
        });
      }
    });
  }, { rootMargin: '-40% 0px -50% 0px' });

  sections.forEach(sec => observer.observe(sec));

  // Close mobile nav after clicking a link
  navLinks.forEach(link => {
    link.addEventListener('click', () => {
      sidebar.classList.remove('open');
    });
  });
</script>

</body>
</html>
